items.original_title: Provide path to submit a manually generated thumbnail for a seed
items.original_body:
(Note that this ticket is essentially a stub for when there's a web archiving work cycle)

Automatic thumbnail generation fails often enough and in such a variety of ways that it would be much easier to submit a pre-made thumbnail in cases where the auto-generated one isn't adequate. The automatic thumbnail generation can fail because:

- the step itself fails with an error, holding up accessioning
- the thumbnail generated is a picture of a SWAP http error or redirect page
- the thumbnail generated doesn't adequately capture the page (blank, missing images, unable to cope with dynamic content)
- the thumbnail generated is from the earliest snapshot, which might have been a bad crawl, so the thumbnail is of an error message acquired during that crawl

It's currently possible to substitute in a manually-generated thumbnail but this requires a high level of knowledge of the workflows, plus back end access to multiple systems, meaning that it's not available to regular users. Providing an alternative path would reduce the burden on repository administrators (i.e. me, to be honest) and enhance web archiving functionality. Good thumbnails make better purls.

items.original_title: How to make mapping for prompt?
items.original_body:
I am trying to make a mapping that like writing cd I'll get prompt to automatically fill in :cd that I can continue, but now instead of that it just does command cd.

`map cd :cd`

items.original_title: Cannot search more for small length manga titles in Anilist tracking
items.original_body:
**App version:** 8.0

**Issue/Request** Cannot search more for small length manga titles in Anilist tracking

**Steps to reproduce (if applicable)** 

 1. Search for "Kuro" in Anilist tracking tab.
 2. Expecting https://anilist.co/manga/85277/Kuro-/
 3. But the search result doesn't list it because more results are required.

**Other details:** Maybe support for filtering by author? Or force track by URL or id? I am in support of the latter as it would probably be taken as a workaround any time search doesn't work for whatever reason.

```
C:\Users\Aryan\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python38-32\lib\site-packages\sklearn\utils\deprecation.py:144: FutureWarning: The sklearn.tree.tree module is deprecated in version 0.22 and will be removed in version 0.24.  File "sklearn	ree\_tree.pyx", line 607, in sklearn.tree._tree.Tree.__cinit__
`ValueError: Buffer dtype mismatch, expected 'SIZE_t' but got 'long long'`
```

items.original_body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]
its a feature request, Is there a possibility to make a Spigot Plugin, that will act as a mod on a server-side. For example, there is a plugin on a server, and I have the mod on the client, I can't speak to others who also have the mod installed. That way we don't have to install the mod on the server but have to install it on the client. Instead of server mod, there will be a server plugin
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
I just did
**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
Maybe add support for SBukkit but It's not that important.
**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

items.original_title: CLI crashes when the config file is missing
items.original_body: Running the command without a config file raises an uncaught exception instead of showing a helpful error.
items.mutated_title: How do I install the CLI on Windows?
items.mutated_body: I am new to this project and would like to know the correct installation steps for Windows.
